ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team's score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team's score */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, preseason) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the player has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive Rebounds */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field Goals */,
  "fg3" INTEGER /* 3-Point Field Goals */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* 3-Point Field Goal Percentage */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* 3-Point Field Goal Attempts */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field Goal Percentage */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field Goal Attempts */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free Throws */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free Throw Percentage */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free Throw Attempts */,
  "mp" TEXT /* Minutes Played */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive Rebounds */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal Fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/Minus */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total Rebounds */,
  "plus_minus_per_48" REAL /* Plus/Minus per 48 minutes */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective Field Goal Percentage */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True Shooting Percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive Rebounds */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field Goals */,
  "fg3" INTEGER /* 3-Point Field Goals */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* 3-Point Field Goal Percentage */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* 3-Point Field Goal Attempts */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field Goal Percentage */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field Goal Attempts */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free Throws */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free Throw Percentage */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free Throw Attempts */,
  "mp" TEXT /* Minutes Played */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive Rebounds */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal Fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/Minus */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total Rebounds */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive Rebounds */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field Goals */,
  "fg3" INTEGER /* 3-Point Field Goals */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* 3-Point Field Goal Percentage */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* 3-Point Field Goal Attempts */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field Goal Percentage */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field Goal Attempts */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free Throws */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free Throw Percentage */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free Throw Attempts */,
  "mp" TEXT /* Minutes Played */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive Rebounds */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal Fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/Minus */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total Rebounds */,
  "career_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in career */,
  "career_games_started" INTEGER /* Total number of games started in career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the injury */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "suspension_type" TEXT /* Type of suspension */,
  "suspension_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspension */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the suspension */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g. view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, preseason)
Name of the venue where the game was played
ID of the team the player belongs to
Number of years of experience the player has
Unique identifier for each game statistic
Unique identifier for each season statistic
Unique identifier for each career statistic

Total number of games started in career
Role of the user (e.g. admin, coach, analyst)
Unique identifier for each access log
ID of the user accessing the platform
Device used by the user to access the platform
